name: Bento Grid
summary: A versatile grid layout component inspired by Japanese bento boxes, featuring modular cards of varying sizes arranged in an aesthetically pleasing, responsive composition for showcasing diverse content.
detailedDescription: The Bento Grid component creates sophisticated content layouts through a modular grid system inspired by traditional Japanese bento boxes - compartmentalized containers where each section holds different items. This design approach has become immensely popular in modern UI for its ability to present diverse content types in a cohesive, visually appealing arrangement. The grid supports cards of varying sizes and aspect ratios, allowing designers to create visual hierarchy through size variation while maintaining overall harmony. Each cell in the grid can contain different content types - images, text, videos, metrics, or interactive elements - while the unified grid structure keeps everything organized and scannable. The component uses CSS Grid for responsive behavior, automatically reflowing content for different screen sizes while preserving the bento aesthetic. Optional hover effects, subtle animations, and visual polish elevate the basic grid into an engaging experience. Perfect for feature showcases, dashboard layouts, portfolio grids, product comparisons, or any context where presenting multiple content types in an organized, visually interesting format enhances communication and user engagement.
purpose: Organize diverse content types into cohesive, visually appealing grid layouts
Create visual hierarchy through varied card sizes within unified grid structure
Present feature showcases, portfolios, or dashboards with bento-box aesthetics
Enable responsive layouts that maintain visual integrity across device sizes
Facilitate content scanning through organized, compartmentalized presentation
behavior: Arranges content cards in modular grid with varying sizes and positions
Uses CSS Grid for responsive reflow across different screen sizes
Maintains visual harmony despite varied card dimensions and content types
Supports optional hover effects and subtle animations for engagement
Preserves aspect ratios and proportions during responsive scaling
Allows flexible content placement within grid cells
Adapts grid density and card sizes based on available space
visualCharacteristics: Modular grid layout with varied card sizes creating visual rhythm
Clean, organized appearance inspired by Japanese bento box aesthetics
Visual hierarchy established through strategic size variations
Cohesive structure unifying diverse content types
Modern, contemporary aesthetic popular in tech and design contexts
Responsive design maintaining bento appearance at all breakpoints
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
